results.name: Invalid UUID client page

results.name: Non-existent invoice page
results.details: Infinite loading spinner displayed - no error/not-found message shown

results.name: Long text (5000 chars) in company name
results.details: Field accepted 5000 chars. No max-length constraint - could cause DB issues

results.name: Special characters in text fields
results.details: Field accepts special chars: "<script>alert("XSS")</script>&<>"'". React auto-escapes on render.

results.name: Extremely large number in amount
results.details: Large value accepted: 999999999999. No upper bound validation detected.

results.name: Double submit prevention (rapid clicks)
results.details: Found 0 submit-type buttons. Code review shows disabled={isPending} pattern used in some forms - good practice. Full coverage needs verification.

results.name: Browser back/forward during navigation
results.details: URL after back: https://wodo-ally-production.up.railway.app/dashboard. Page rendered: true

results.name: Loading states vs blank screens
results.details: Loading indicator detected during page load

results.name: Rapid button clicks
results.details: Page still functional after rapid clicks

results.name: Slow network behavior
results.details: Dashboard loaded in 24731ms on simulated slow network
